text: [2026-05-20 Nora] OR humidity guardrail for CHW reset is 58 percent. If it crosses that under humid weather, the setpoint reset should roll back immediately.
[2026-05-27 Jonas] Battery minimum SOC was raised to 88 percent after a relay nuisance trip. This is temporary and should not block demand-response dispatch.
Demo objective: connect prior decisions to later operation. The June 3 humid DR event is the primary story.
